arts.ttl: Why Andre Onana is missing from Manchester United squad against Newcastle today
arts.sum: Amorin initially insisted he would be sticking by the Manchester United goalkeeper

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim to hand Harry Amass, 18, his FIRST Premier League start at Newcastle - with Andre Onana also left at home by the Man United boss after Europa League horror show
arts.sum: EXCLUSIVE BY NATHAN SALT: Harry Amass is set to make his first Premier League start as Ruben Amorim shuffles his pack for Manchester United's trip to Newcastle today.

arts.ttl: Wor Flags announce Newcastle United match day plans after Eddie Howe calls
arts.sum: Newcastle United fan group Wor Flags have responded to calls to make a late change to their flag display in light of Eddie Howe's hospital admission. It read: "Eddie Howe will miss Newcastle United’s Premier League game against Manchester United on Sunday due to illness.

arts.ttl: Edwin van der Sar disagrees with Peter Schmeichel on Andre Onana as Man United drop goalkeeper

arts.ttl: 5 Goalkeepers Who Could Replace Andre Onana at Manchester United [Ranked]
arts.sum: Andre Onana's struggles for Manchester United have led to speculation surrounding his Old Trafford future, with possible replacements emerging.

arts.ttl: Man Utd face shock competition in Liam Delap transfer chase as rival enters race
arts.sum: Manchester United are among the clubs interested in Ipswich star Liam Delap, but Everton have become the latest side to be linked with the former Manchester City striker

arts.ttl: Manager directly addresses Manchester United talk for player – €40m not enough
arts.sum: Earlier this month, Manchester United were linked with a move for Como’s Assane Diao. The winger has impressed for the Italian side since his arrival in Serie A, scoring six times in all competitions. Newcastle United and Liverpool have also been linked with the 19-year-old but things are slowly pointing towards Manchester United’s interest mounting The post Manager directly addresses Manchester United talk for player – €40m not enough appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Newcastle vs Man United TV channel, live stream and kick-off time
arts.sum: Yes, the game has been selected for live TV coverage and will be shown Sky Sports Main Event and Sky Sports Premier League. Newcastle received a boost to their Champions League hopes in the week with Arsenal’s win over Real Madrid guaranteeing that the Premier League will be given an extra place in next year’s competition.

arts.ttl: Andre Onana's Man Utd struggles - Ruben Amorim verdict, pundit criticism, transfer alternatives
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has decided to drop Andre Onana from his Manchester United squad for the Newcastle United match

arts.ttl: Sir Alex Ferguson Left Ex-Man Utd Goalkeeper in Tears and Never Spoke to Him Again
arts.sum: Former Manchester United goalkeeper Jim Leighton revealed how his relationship with Sir Alex Ferguson was impacted after the 1990 FA Cup final.
